CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/BARRIE BECKER AS COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION WITH NO JUDGMENT BEING ENTERED & DEF. PLACED ON PROBATION PERIOD FOR 1 YR. UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS - AT ISSUE MEMO STRUCK BY PL. & NEW MEMO WILL BE FILED IF DEF. FAILS PROB. PERIOD - DEF. MAKE BACK RENT PMTS TOTALLING $896 (PMT. OF $224 ON 2-23-94, 3-4-94, 4-4-94 & 5-4-94) - ADDITIONALLY, DEF. TO PAY RENT ON TIME - DEF. TO CHANGE LOCKS & GIVER COPIES OF KEYS ONLY TO APT. MANAGER - DEF. NOT TO GIVE KEYS TO HIS SON WILLIAM - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - UPON COMPLETING 1 YR. PROB, PL. WILL FILE DISM. W/PREJUDICE. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIPULATION.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR BECKER, BARRIE L AS ATTORNEY FOR BEASLEY, WILLIE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE JURY TRIAL OF FEB-23-1994 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
